description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses python:slim as the default Docker image and caches the Pipenv directory at $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache. Define three jobs in the default test stage: a sast job that runs on the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, computes SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION, executes a docker run of the GitLab SAST container with SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL default 3, and always uploads gl-sast-report.json as an artifact while allowing failure; a tests job that runs python -V, installs pipenv via pip, runs pipenv install, pipenv sync --dev, and then pipenv run pytest; and a type-check job that runs python -V, installs pipenv, runs pipenv install, pipenv sync --dev, and finally pipenv run mypy . No special rules or only/except conditions are defined.
